name: Coffee Rum Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter the sides of a heavy 3-quart saucepan.
2. In the prepared saucepan, combine sugar, milk, light cream, corn syrup, coffee powder, and salt.
3. Bring to boiling, stirring constantly.
4. Cook without stirring to soft-ball stage (236°F), about 12 to 15 minutes.
5. Remove from heat.
6. Add butter or margarine, vanilla extract, and rum flavoring. Do not stir.
7. Cool in saucepan to lukewarm (110°F).
8. Beat vigorously with a wooden spoon until the candy begins to hold its shape and loses its glossy appearance, about 10 minutes.
9. Turn the mixture into a buttered 8x8x2-inch dish.
10. Score the surface in squares; top each square with a walnut half.
11. Cover the candy with clear plastic wrap; chill thoroughly.
12. Cut through the candy completely along the scored lines to serve. Makes about 1 1/2 pounds.
